_meta.description: Per-hero, per-slot-type fused-hash similarity acceptance thresholds, generated by scripts/calibrate_thresholds.py (recommendations.md §6.1).
_meta.fallback: Heroes with no entry here use PhaseDetectionConfig.HASH_FUSION_ACCEPT_MIN / HASH_FUSION_TENTATIVE_MIN as the default threshold.
